title: Bruce Moreland
text: Home * People * Bruce Moreland Bruce Moreland [1] Bruce Moreland , an American computer scientist, former Microsoft employee and computer chess programmer, author of Ferret , one of the strongest chess engines at its time [2] . Bruce published the open source chess program Gerbil for educational purpose, and maintained a great computer chess programming site. The Gerbil site [3] and programming topics are archived by the Wayback Machine [4] .
